decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id 'route_m15-sbs' is an existing registry record that already carries the alias 'route_m15-sbs-2011-04-27-perf'. The observation is already correctly resolved to its canonical record; no different target applies.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M15 Select Bus Service launched October 10, 2010

decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id 'route_m15-limited-2010-06-09' is an existing registry record with alias 'route_m15-limited-2011-04-27'. Already correctly resolved; no different target applies. Do-not-merge pairs confirm M15 Limited is distinct from M15 SBS and M15 Local.

Observation's base_record_id 'route_m15-local-2010-09-14' is an existing registry record with alias 'route_m15-local-2011-04-27'. Already correctly resolved; no different target applies. Do-not-merge pairs confirm M15 Local is distinct from M15 Limited and M15 SBS.
